BaselineDescription: SQLite file hardening baseline for self-hosted databases
DriftDescription: Backup and mount-path checks fail per 10_databases.csv
FindingDescription: DB-INF-001 has BackupEnabled=FALSE because the SQLite file's default path is not covered by the compose auth-data volume mount - not fully compliant until the path/mount are aligned and backups re-enabled
RemediationDescription: Align auth-data volume mount with the SQLite file path then re-enable backups
